steps.title: A professional OTC experience in 3 steps

apply.title: Submit your application
apply.description: Kick off the process by filling out the short form. Our team reviews your details quickly, reaches out, and guides you on the next steps.

register.title: Complete your onboarding
register.description: Upload the required documents to finish onboarding. Our compliance team reviews and verifies your account, and you can track every step directly from the panel.

trade.title: Start trading
trade.description: Once approved, receive tailored pricing and execute OTC trades with a secure, fast, and transparent experience. Our team is available at each stage whenever you need support.

items.name: Mehmet Kaya

items.quote: Access to liquidity and operational support lets us handle large trades comfortably.

portfolio.title: Build your portfolio
portfolio.description: Take control of your financial future. Whether you’re a seasoned trader or just starting out, easily trade over 300 cryptocurrencies on your terms, with low fees.

faq.firstAnswer: OTCN is a crypto trading platform that helps you buy, sell, and track cryptocurrency markets with real-time prices and live market data. You can create an account, explore market charts, and place trades in minutes.

coinDetail.description: This is a placeholder detail page. Market data, chart, order book, and asset metadata can be connected here when the real endpoint is ready.

footer.description: A reliable, fast, and transparent OTC experience for large trades.

header.title: Complete Your Corporate Account Application
header.description: Complete the following steps to start OTC transactions and activate your account.

pre.label: Pre-Application
pre.description: Start your application and fill in basic details.

company.label: Company Information
company.description: Enter company and authorized person details.

digitalDocumentUpload.infoTitle: Digital uploads are for pre-check purposes.
digitalDocumentUpload.infoDescription: After your documents are approved in the system, you will need to send the wet-signed originals to us by courier.

documents.invoice: Invoice issued in the company name within the last 3 months

reviewProcess.title: Your Documents Are Being Reviewed
reviewProcess.subtitle: Your documents have been taken into review by our compliance team.
reviewProcess.description: The wet-signed documents you submitted for your OTC transactions are being reviewed by our compliance team. You will be notified by email when the process is complete. You can also track your process here at any time.
reviewProcess.notificationDescription: When the evaluation process is complete, you will be contacted using the details below.
reviewProcess.helpDescription: You can contact our support team for questions about the evaluation process.

bank.taxNumberPlaceholder: Individual / Legal Entity Tax ID Number

shareholder.notice: By regulation, entering details for shareholders with 25% or more ownership is sufficient.
shareholder.noShareholderCheckbox: There are no individual shareholders with 25% or more ownership.

kyc.title: KYC Verification
kyc.description: Please use one of the options below to verify your identity.
kyc.digitalDesc: Verify instantly by scanning a QR code or using a link.
kyc.courierDesc: Request a courier to complete identity verification physically.

digitalPanel.title: Digital KYC Verification
digitalPanel.info: You will complete the identity verification process from your mobile device using this QR code or link. You will leave this page during the process.
digitalPanel.qrHint: Scan the QR code with your mobile device.
digitalPanel.linkHint: You can copy the link and open it on your mobile device.
digitalPanel.step1: Scan the QR code or open the link on your mobile device
digitalPanel.step2: Photograph the front and back of your ID document

courierPanel.title: Courier KYC Verification
courierPanel.infoContent: When you choose the Courier KYC option, the Digital Document Upload step will be skipped. You will deliver all your documents directly via courier.
courierPanel.smsHint: An SMS will be sent to your phone to create a courier appointment.
courierPanel.smsSuccess: An SMS has been sent to your registered number to direct you for a courier request.
courierPanel.step1: Check the SMS sent to your phone
courierPanel.step2: Go to the Kuryenet system by clicking the link in the SMS
courierPanel.step3: Select the date and time that suits you
courierPanel.documentsInfo: The following documents must be delivered with wet signatures when the courier arrives. In case of missing or incorrect documents, your corporate account activation process may be delayed. Please ensure all documents are up to date and valid.
courierPanel.documentHint: Prepare the documents and deliver them when the courier arrives.

sig.title: Company Signature Circulars
bullets: Must be a current document received within the last 3 months.
If signatures of persons appointed as proxies for your company are to be used, the signature circulars and power of attorney for these persons must also be uploaded together.
You can review it by downloading the sample document.
sig.sampleDesc: Sample file template for signature circulars

gazette.title: Trade Registry Gazette
bullets: Must be the gazette showing the company's current partnership structure and authorized persons.
All important gazette issues such as establishment and address changes must be added.

activity.title: Certificate of Activity
bullets: Must be received within the last 3 months.
Can be obtained from the Chamber of Commerce or Industry.

tax.title: Tax Plate
bullets: Must be the current tax plate for the current year.

declaration.title: User Declaration Form
bullets: All fields of the form must be filled completely and signed.

petition.title: Account Opening Request Petition
bullets: Must be written on company letterhead and signed by authorized persons.

invoice.title: Invoice Sample
bullets: Must be an invoice (electricity, water, internet, etc.) registered in the name of the company within the last 3 months.

ubo.title: UBO Declaration
bullets: It is the declaration form showing the ultimate beneficial owners.

hero.descriptionLine2: Buy, sell, and track markets with real-time data.

steps.title: Create an account
steps.description: Set up your account in just a few minutes. Sign up using your email address or phone number, enable two-factor authentication, and choose your location to automatically set your preferred currency.

steps.title: Complete identity verification (KYC)
steps.description: Submit a valid ID and finish a short liveness check to comply with local requirements. In most cases, the verification process is completed within minutes.

steps.title: Buy crypto
steps.description: Depending on the payment options available in your country, you can buy crypto instantly using a debit or credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or make a bank transfer / ACH to benefit from lower fees and higher limits.

whatIsCrypto.title: What is cryptocurrency?
whatIsCrypto.firstParagraph: Cryptocurrency is a form of digital money that exists only online and is protected by cryptographic technology, unlike physical currencies such as the U.S. Dollar or other traditional fiat money. These digital assets operate on blockchain technology, a decentralized system that functions as a shared and transparent digital record.
whatIsCrypto.secondParagraph: All cryptocurrency transactions are permanently logged on the blockchain. Once verified, they cannot be altered, reversed, or manipulated, ensuring a high level of security and trust.

future.description: Futures trading is on its way. We're putting the finishing touches on leverage and margin tools.
